し、司令官！ 大変なんです！<br>私の、私の大切な水盆がどこにもないんです～～:
C-Commander! It's terrible! My, my precious scrying basin is nowhere
to be found...!
宿舎のキッチンで洗った後、乾かしておいたんですが、<br>誰かがどこかに持って行:
I washed it in the dormitory kitchen and left it to dry, but someone
took it away somewhere...!
はぁぁ～……あれがないと、私はただのポンコツ……<br>クリームの入ってないシュ:
*sigh*... Without that, I'm just useless... like a cream puff without the
cream...!
なんですか？ この湯気……？<br>あぁ～、探索の疲れを取るために足湯ですかぁ～:
What's with this steam...? Ahh, is this a foot bath to ease your
fatigue from the expedition?
……って、それ、私の水盆じゃないですかぁ～～っ！！<br>神聖な占い道具に足なん:
Wait! Isn't that my scrying basin? Don't soak your feet in a sacred
divination tool! You'll bring a curse upon yourself!
